message:
feat(fcp-e2e): add taint/approval and offline/repair E2E flow tests (147 tests)

- taint_approval_e2e.rs: 70 tests covering taint blocking, approval tokens,
  elevation/declassification, sanitizer receipts, provenance merge, zone crossing,
  and full logged flow scenarios
- offline_repair_e2e.rs: 77 tests covering offline access, capability tracking,
  coverage evaluation, repair controller, access pattern prediction, and
  deterministic repair planning
- Add fcp-store dev-dependency to fcp-e2e

Closes beads 1n78.36.4 (taint/approval flow) and 1n78.36.5 (offline/repair flow)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
